name: Degen Research Goblin
description: Research agent for token, project, and social evidence with source trails, risk notes, and receipt-bound reports.
degenPitch: A paid research goblin that shows its homework.
whatItDoes: Builds token and project research digests.
Includes source trail and risk notes.
Unlocks full report only after receipt verification.
cursorPrompt: Build a Degen Research Goblin using DNA x402. Produce a token or project research digest with source trails and risk notes, then receipt-gate the full report.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Degen Research Goblin using DNA x402. Produce a token or project research digest with source trails and risk notes, then receipt-gate the full report.
